## Priority

- [ ] P0 — Critical (blocking core loop)
- [ ] P1 — High (key user value)
- [ ] P2 — Medium (nice to have, planned)
- [ ] P3 — Low (backlog)

## Story Points

- [ ] 1 pt — Trivial (< 2 hours)
- [ ] 2 pts — Small (2–4 hours)
- [ ] 3 pts — Medium (4–8 hours)
- [ ] 5 pts — Large (1–2 days)
- [ ] 8 pts — XL (2–4 days)
- [ ] 13 pts — Epic (needs breakdown)

## QA Checklist

- [ ] Feature works on iOS
- [ ] Feature works on Android
- [ ] Feature works on Web
- [ ] Works in dark mode
- [ ] Works with slow/no network
- [ ] Works for free tier users
- [ ] Works for Pro users
- [ ] Analytics events fire correctly
- [ ] Error states handled gracefully

## Deployment Checklist

- [ ] Feature flag required: <!-- FLAG_NAME -->
- [ ] New env vars documented
- [ ] Migration included
- [ ] Rollback plan documented
